heroHeadline: Day 43: Succession Vacuum Enters Seventh Week; Semana Santa Passes Without Incident
heroSubtitle: Day 43 since El Mencho's killing at Tapalpa, Jalisco. O3 (Juan Carlos Valencia González) maintains the collective council structure enforced by Grupo Élite's paramilitary capacity. El Jardinero (Audias Flores Silva) — primary high-value targeting objective with a $5 million U.S. bounty — remains at large. Operativo Semana Santa Segura 2026 (March 27–April 12) achieved its core objective: no major cartel violence at national tourist destinations during Semana Santa. Mexico reports 70% decline in fentanyl flows and 97% drop in illegal crossings under Sheinbaum. Operativo Enjambre cumulative total: 64+ officials detained across Jalisco, Michoacán, and additional states.
footerNote: Data sourced from SEDENA, SSPC, FGR, DEA, U.S. DOJ, NCTC, U.S. Treasury (OFAC), InSight Crime, Crisis Group, Wilson Center, Reuters, AP, Wall Street Journal, France 24, CGTN, Al Jazeera, Latin Times, Infobae México, La Silla Rota, WOLA, Milenio, Excélsior, Proceso, and major Mexican news outlets. All contested figures noted. Last update: April 6, 2026.
